title: payment-processor pods entering CrashLoopBackOff after deploy
description: Pods in namespace production are restarting repeatedly with OOMKilled events after the latest deploy. Checkout traffic is degraded.

title: user-service rollout stuck with ImagePullBackOff on broken image tag
description: A deployment is referencing a missing image tag. New pods fail with ImagePullBackOff while old replicas continue serving.

title: analytics-worker restarting with repeated OOMKilled events
description: Background workers in production show memory pressure, repeated restarts, and degraded queue processing.
